title: Dune!
description: Roll a ball across endless sand dunes. Hold to press it down and build speed on the downhills, then release near a peak to launch into the air. Score by flying above the line — the higher you soar the more points, all the way up to space and the moon. Land smoothly on the next slope to chain combo multipliers; smash into a reverse slope or run out of momentum and it's game over.
controls: Hold to dive and build speed on downhills; release near a peak to fly. Time your hold to land smoothly on the next downhill and chain combos
